header.headline: v6.6 Failure Decision Tree
header.subtitle: Start from the first failing gate. Do not debug everything at once.

start.title: make v6.6-gate failed?
start.body: Choose the first failing gate family before inspecting broader symptoms.

l0_l1.title: L0 / L1 fail?
l0_l1.body: Kernel map or tooling contracts failed.

l2.title: L2 fail?
l2.body: Matrix smoke failed for a model row or build artifact.

l3_l4.title: L3 / L4 fail?
l3_l4.body: Parity matrix or long-decode gate failed.

contract_drift.title: Contract Drift Branch
contract_drift.body: Compare changed script signatures, flags, and kernel maps first.

model_row.title: Model Row Failure Branch
model_row.body: Use the failing row note, then rerun the single model command.
detail: Check cache mismatch, smoke load, and build path

parity_branch.title: Parity / Long-Decode Branch
parity_branch.body: Check runtime availability, then rerun the parity validators.
detail: Re-run parity matrix and long decode validators

finish.title: Finish Branch
finish.body: After the failing leaf is green, rerun the full gate once.

footer.note: Operational rule: isolate one failing gate, one failing row, and one failing contract at a time.
